text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On a day off, I head over to the park and...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: HUUUUUP!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Argh, I need to be faster and flashier... But how?!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Don't creep up on me like that! I thought
you were a baddie!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Siiigh... I suppose I'll tell you!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
This is top secret, but... I'm preparing a new super
cool special move for my next race!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Just as my opponents let their guards down... I'll
speed up super fast and overtake 'em all in a
flash!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: I call it... the Pegasus Mach Strike!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Only problem is... I don't have a lot of time
before my next race.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm training on my days off as well to
perfect the Pegasus Mach Strike!
choice_data_list: That strike thing sounds pretty neat.
That strike thing sounds pretty neat.
You shouldn't push yourself too hard.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm training on my days off as well to
perfect the Pegasus Mach Strike!
choice_data_list: That strike thing sounds pretty neat.
That strike thing sounds pretty neat.
You shouldn't push yourself too hard.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
It's not "that strike thing"! It's the Pegasus Mach
Strike! It's my special move, so say it right!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: But you're totally right! It is super neat! The coolest thing ever! In fact, everyone should have their own special move!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I've been kinda worried, though. Like... is my
special move too normal, you think?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I kinda feel like it should be something flashy
that'll grab people's attention.
choice_data_list:
Even a normal skill can be special if it's
perfected.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
That's a neat way to look at it! Come to think of
it, Carrot Ranger's special move is just a punch!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that settles it—I won't waver! I'll keep
working on this move up until my race! Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Oh... I think someone told Carrot Ranger
something along those lines too.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
But Carrot Ranger didn't take their advice and
kept training and training and...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
No, she lost because she was so exhausted from
all her training.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
But afterwards, she rested up properly and
became even more powerful than before.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Oh... I get it now. I was just about to put myself in
the same position and lose.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I'm gonna stop pushing myself and
make sure I have a full tank of energy for my race.
